story_prompt: In a claustrophobic, dimly lit urban alleyway, a rugged operative fiercely battles masked assailants in brutal hand-to-hand combat and gunfire, before frantically dragging a young civilian through the chaotic streets and up a flight of stairs to an open-air escape.

cues.audio_class: dark cinematic synth drone with low-frequency rumble
aggressive engine revving and mechanical gears
high-pitched mechanical whine and metallic resonance
rhythmic mechanical clicking and metal transformation sounds
loud percussive explosion with energy pulse
falling debris and crumbling building ambience
